readme_html:
Best of AI

A hand-picked, regularly updated collection of the best AI tools currently active — spanning generative models, productivity enhancements, developer platforms, creative engines, autonomous agents, research aides, and more.

Table of Contents

  1. Overview
  2. AI Tools by Category
    • Writing & General AI Assistants
    • Image & Video Generation
    • Coding & App Builders
    • Productivity & Knowledge
    • Voice & Music
    • Automation & Integrations
    • Data, Research & Analysis
    • Open-Source AI Models & Frameworks
  3. Why These Tools?
  4. Contributing
  5. Related Lists
  6. License

Overview

This repository serves as your go-to guide for AI tools that are actively maintained and widely adopted in 2025, carefully curated based on impact, innovation, and community feedback.

AI Tools by Category

Writing & General AI Assistants

  • ChatGPT (GPT-5) – OpenAI’s flagship model delivering dynamic model routing for optimized, low-hallucination responses.
  • Claude 3.5 / Opus – Anthropic’s advanced assistant with deep reasoning and large context support.
  • Gemini Advanced (Google) – Google’s next-gen AI with multimodal capabilities and deep Search integration.
  • Perplexity Pro – AI-enhanced search engine offering real-time answers with citations.
  • Mistral Large – Powerful open-weight European LLM excelling in reasoning and coding.
  • Pi (Inflection AI) – Empathetic conversational AI designed for “personal intelligence.”
  • You.com – Enterprise AI platform offering search, chat, and productivity tools.
  • Quora Poe – Unified access to multiple AI models from one interface.
  • Qwen AI – Qwen AI is a free chat-based AI platform that offers generous token limits.

Image & Video Generation

  • Midjourney v7 – Premier text-to-image engine (note: official domain; adjust if needed).
  • DALL-E 3 – OpenAI's advanced text-to-image model with precise prompt adherence and integrated ChatGPT access.
  • Adobe Firefly – Creative Cloud's AI image and generative art suite.
  • Google Veo 3 – Google’s advanced text-to-video model (accessible via Gemini plans).
  • Runway Gen-4 – Cinematic-quality AI video generation platform.
  • Leonardo AI – Ideal for stylized illustrations and game assets.
  • CivitAI – Community hub for Stable Diffusion model sharing.
  • Magnific AI – Image upscaler and detail enhancer.
  • Kaiber – AI animation and music video creation tool.
  • Animated Drawings – Animating children's drawings of characters.

Coding & App Builders

  • GitHub Copilot – AI pair-programming tool integrated into GitHub.
  • Cursor – AI-first programming environment.
  • Vercel v0 – AI-powered UI component generation with instant deployment capabilities.
  • Aider – Terminal-based code assistant.
  • Claude Code – Anthropic’s developer-targeted version of Claude.
  • Windsurf (Codeium) – AI-powered coding IDE.
  • Zed – Fast collaborative editor with AI enhancements.
  • Vibecode – Build iOS apps via natural language (powered by modern LLMs).
  • Replit Ghostwriter – AI tools for live online code collaboration.
  • Sourcegraph Cody – AI assistant for navigating large codebases.
  • Tabnine – Privacy-focused code autocompletion.
  • Warp Terminal – AI-enhanced terminal wrapper for macOS with intelligent features (use defensively).
  • Kiro – Task-based AI IDE that brings structure to AI coding with spec-driven development.

Productivity & Knowledge

  • Notion AI – AI-enhanced workspace for writing and projects.
  • Obsidian – AI-enhanced features for the popular markdown-based knowledge management system.
  • Mem AI – AI personal knowledge management.
  • Recall – Learning assistant with summaries and quizzes.
  • Otter.ai – Transcription and meeting summarization.
  • Readwise Reader – Improved reading with smart highlights and notes.
  • Taskade AI – Project management with AI workflows.
  • Slite AI – Team docs with AI-powered summaries.
  • Superhuman AI – Speedy, intelligent email management.
  • Gamma – AI-powered platform for creating presentations, documents, and webpages with intelligent design and fast workflows.

Voice & Music

  • ElevenLabs v3 – High-fidelity TTS supporting 70+ languages.
  • ElevenLabs Music – Generative music with vocal control.
  • Suno AI v3 – Rapid AI song generation.
  • Aiva – AI for film and game music composition.
  • Voicemod AI – Real-time AI voice modulation.
  • Respeecher – Voice cloning for media.

Automation & Integrations

  • n8n – Open-source no-code workflow automation.
  • Zapier AI Actions – Natural-language workflow automation in Zapier.
  • Make (Integromat) – Visual logic automation platform.
  • Fathom – AI assistant for meeting capture and summaries.
  • Gumloop – AI workflow builder akin to Zapier.
  • AgentGPT – Deploy autonomous browser AI agents.
  • Auto-GPT Next – Advanced autonomous AI task runners.

Data, Research & Analysis

  • Perplexity Pro – Premium AI-powered search with multiple model support.
  • Elicit – AI literature research assistant.
  • Consensus – AI summaries of academic research.
  • Komo AI – Private, personalized AI search.
  • ChatDOC – AI assistant for reading and querying PDFs.
  • SciSpace – AI-driven academic paper exploration.
  • Tavily AI Search API – Developer-friendly AI search services.

Open-Source AI Models & Frameworks

  • Llama 3 – Meta’s open-weight large language model series.
  • Mistral 7B & Mixtral – Efficient, high-performance open LLMs.
  • Phi-3 (Microsoft) – Compact, optimized LLMs.
  • Stable Diffusion 3 – Open-source image generation.
  • ComfyUI – Node-based interface for Stable Diffusion workflows.
  • Whisper – OpenAI’s speech-to-text model.
  • LangChain – Framework for building LLM apps.
  • Hugging Face Transformers – Essential library for working with state-of-the-art transformer models.
  • Ollama – Local deployment of AI models with one-line setup.
  • Anaconda – Complete Python/R distribution for data science and AI development, including AI Navigator and Anaconda Toolbox with easy Jupyter notebook creation.
  • Open Interpreter – Natural-language interface for controlling your computer.

Why These Tools?

  • Freshness – All entries are actively maintained as of mid-August 2025.
  • Breadth – Covering creative, technical, productivity, research, and autonomous ecosystems.
  • Proven Performance – Widely adopted with strong benchmarks and community traction.
  • Innovation – Includes bleeding-edge tools like Veo 3, Vibecode, and ElevenLabs Music.

Contributing

Have a powerful tool missing here?
Submit a Pull Request or open an Issue — include name, category, short description, and recent activity proof (date or source).

Related Lists

  • Awesome AI Tools – A broad inventory of AI tools across domains.
  • AI For Developer - a curated ranked list of ai tools for developers
  • Awesome AI Coding Tools – Focused on AI in software development.
  • Top AI Directories – Curated directories for discovering AI tools.

License

MIT License
